microsoft_ft: Scaled Azure's **forward-deployed recovery validation program** from a 2-person operation into a platformized system, standardizing end-to-end implementation workflows to sustain 45+ annual resilience drills across enterprise customers including Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Led **0→1 development** of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, defining self-service scheduling requirements and custom tooling that reduced operational toil by 30% and transitioned complex drill execution to a scalable, repeatable delivery model.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability, delivering a **rack-level drill program in 4 months** with a 94% recovery rate — surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a new continuous validation standard across enterprise deployments.

Directed **14 cross-org recovery engagements** under executive visibility, including serving as technical lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation implementation tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract requiring deep architectural discovery.

Built an **internal AI agent** to automate drill planning workflows, cutting planning cycle time by 39% and increasing deployment capacity by 21% — translating implementation bottlenecks into scalable tooling improvements.

Designed and operated feedback loops with Engineering and Product, translating **real-world deployment challenges** from enterprise customer engagements into actionable technical requirements that directly shaped Azure's platform roadmap.
microsoft_2023: Drove **enterprise adoption** of AI-driven code generation workflows across 14 key Azure service teams, conducting hands-on technical demos and training sessions that delivered 37 engineering hours saved monthly.

Shaped the product roadmap toward **intent-based YAML generation** by leading 11+ structured discovery interviews with Azure service teams, surfacing critical feature gaps and translating customer requirements into actionable engineering specifications.

Improved data retrieval and **AI-powered semantic search** fidelity by implementing rigorous metadata standards and migrating documentation infrastructure, reducing lookup time by 83% across internal engineering teams.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched regions 28% faster by securing cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework, driving consensus across 140+ teams through structured technical discovery.

Conducted **requirements-gathering interviews** with 20+ service teams to surface 81 hours of manual effort per region launch, then built a prioritized roadmap to automate critical implementation paths and eliminate operational toil.

Built a **Power BI data pipeline dashboard** to track and visualize operational toil across 140+ teams, enabling leadership to identify automation gaps and target high-impact implementation improvements with precision.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot migration by leading end-to-end technical discovery, dependency mapping across 1,200+ stations, and scoping a legacy OS transition strategy for production robotics infrastructure.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies including sprint planning and retrospectives, **resolving 40+ high-priority tickets** and stabilizing the developer intake process by maintaining a rigorously prioritized implementation backlog.

Aligned IT, Operations, and Engineering stakeholders to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and establishing a repeatable delivery methodology for future rollouts.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by managing end-to-end scoping, requirements gathering, and invoicing for 200+ monthly proposals — building and operationalizing a CRM workflow that standardized the full customer engagement lifecycle.

Reduced **Customer Acquisition Cost by 13%** and lifted conversion rates by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy, optimizing the website and Google Business profile to drive qualified inbound pipeline.

Improved leadership pricing decisions by conducting **financial profitability analysis** across 1,000+ project records, identifying margin leaks and delivering data-backed recommendations that directly influenced operational strategy.

'Custom tooling' and 'internal tooling' from JD woven into microsoft_ft bullets #2 and #5, describing the Resilience Automation Platform and AI agent as tooling built to scale implementation delivery.

'Technical discovery' and 'requirements gathering' from JD woven into microsoft_2022 bullet#2 and amazon_robotics bullet#1 to mirror Notion's emphasis on deep discovery and scoping as core FDE competencies.

'Feedback loops with Product and Engineering' from JD woven into microsoft_ft bullet#6, directly echoing Notion's expectation that FDEs translate real-world implementation challenges into roadmap influence.

'Data pipelines' from JD surfaced in microsoft_2022 bullet#3 (Power BI pipeline dashboard) and microsoft_2023 bullet#3 (semantic search infrastructure migration) to reinforce hands-on pipeline and integration experience.
